Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input A scenario description involving a temporal profile model for an insurance claim handling process database schema PostgreSQL and specific anomalies in the temporal profile Task The LLM needs to act as an analyst It must 1 Identify anomalies 2 Generate hypotheses 3 Propose SQL verification queries Constraint Do not reference the instructions Present independently Context PostgreSQL database

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Data Anomalies Schema claims adjusters claim_events Temporal Profile Key Points R A 1h avg 10m std normal R E 1d avg 8h std normal R P 25h avg 1h std Suspiciously low std dev A C 2h avg 1h std Very fast closure E N 5m avg 1m std Too fast P N 7 days avg 2 days std Huge delay N C 30m avg 5m std normal Focus Areas 1 R P low variance 2 P N high variance long duration 3 A C short duration skipping steps 4 E N extremely short duration

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: From data infer suspicious metrics low std dev rigid system high avg time bottleneck short time skipped steps

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Drafting the Content Section 1 Anomaly Identification Highlight specific pairs explain why suspicious Section 2 Hypothesis Generation For R P Automated approval low risk claims Batch processing For P N Manual notification Email server issues Resource shortage For A C Claims closed prematurely System error Fraudulent adjustment For E N Missing P step Auto approval after evaluation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Refining SQL Queries Self Join Strategy claim_events e1 join claim_events e2 on claim_id e1 activity X e2 activity Y e1 timestamp less than e2 timestamp PostgreSQL EXTRACT EPOCH FROM timestamp2 minus timestamp1 Filtering first occurrence each activity per claim

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review against Constraints Do not reference prompt instructions Present independently Ensure SQL valid PostgreSQL

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Final Polish Structure response clearly headings professional tone Check SQL logic Correction process mining first instance activity per claim Revised SQL Strategy CTE first_events SELECT claim_id activity MIN timestamp first_ts GROUP BY claim_id activity join CTE calculate deltas Self Correction handle multiple events LEFT JOIN for missing activities

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Final Output Construction Title Temporal Process Analysis Report Section 1 Anomaly Summary Section 2 Root Cause Hypotheses Section 3 SQL Verification Plan Self Correction R to P variance per adjuster claim type Wait one more check Do not reference Present standalone SQL Detail EXTRACT EPOCH standard
